name: @clearline/data-access-team
description: Team-management data-access layer for clearline-web: React Query hooks over /api/team/* (roster, invite, role change, removal) and the public /api/team/invites/* acceptance flow, surfacing the server's Owner/Admin 403s as typed errors (US-CW-031). No UI, no business rules.

metadata.scope: Data-access lib for EPIC-CW-017 (US-CW-031 Team Management: Invite, Role Assignment & Removal).
